nodes.description: SVG sprite sheet bundling all frontend icons as <symbol> definitions for <use> href references; served as a static asset from frontend/public/
Bluesky social media brand mark (butterfly logo), monochrome fill #08060d, viewBox 0 0 16 17
Discord community platform brand mark (gamepad/chat bubble silhouette), monochrome fill #08060d, viewBox 0 0 20 19
Documentation/knowledge-base icon combining document pages and a sparkle/star motif, stroked in purple #aa3bff, viewBox 0 0 21 20 — likely links to project docs or knowledge base
GitHub brand mark (Octocat silhouette), monochrome fill #08060d, viewBox 0 0 19 19
Social/community icon combining a person silhouette and a sparkle/edit badge, stroked in purple #aa3bff, viewBox 0 0 20 20 — likely represents community features or user social actions
X (formerly Twitter) brand mark, monochrome fill #08060d, viewBox 0 0 19 19
The RAG Workbench frontend web application that consumes this sprite sheet for its iconography
Bluesky — decentralized social network that the Bluesky icon links to
Discord — community/chat platform that the Discord icon links to
GitHub — code hosting platform; the project repository that the GitHub icon links to
X (formerly Twitter) — social media platform that the X icon links to
Documentation/knowledge-base access point within the frontend, indicated by the documentation-icon
Community or social-interaction feature within the frontend, indicated by the social-icon
